title: corypha gembanga
intro: Corypha gembanga, also known as the gembanga palm or Corypha palm, is a species of palm tree native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Corypha gembanga include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's sap or leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or topical creams, although its use and preparation may vary depending on the local tradition and available information.
